questions.question: Describe the difference between a point, line and edge detection algorithms in image segmentation. Provide an example of how each is used. (8 marks)

A binary image of a house is given. The image has been pre-processed to enhance the edges. What is the purpose of thresholding in this context? Explain the difference between basic global thresholding and basic local thresholding. (10 marks)
A binary image of a road is given. Divide the image into regions of interest (ROI) using the 'watershed' technique. Explain the working of the 'watershed' algorithm. (12 marks)
